metadata.description: DUBSAR marketplace — decision memory, evidence, and human governance for long-running Claude Code projects. Claude Code is the first integration; the local DUBSAR Desktop runtime is required. Private beta preview: access controlled, NOT published, production use unsupported. Some internal technical identifiers still use "scribe" for beta compatibility.

plugins.name: scribe-bridge
plugins.description: DUBSAR — decision memory, evidence, and human governance for long-running Claude Code projects. Thin, read-only Claude Code plugin (technical package scribe-bridge) that requires the local DUBSAR Desktop runtime: metadata-only start/activation/access-status/doctor surfaces plus read-only Mission, lot, contract, execution, evidence, and workspace-structure commands, served by the bundled scribe-bridge MCP server. Private beta preview: access controlled, production use unsupported. The private Backend/Core is not included and is reached only via bounded metadata; the plugin never handles a licence key.
